data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of a broad trough of low pressure, there will be occasional showers and thunderstorms over Guangdong in the next couple of days. With the trough of low pressure weakening and an anticyclone aloft covering the coast of Guangdong gradually, showers will ease off gradually over the region in the middle and latter parts of next week. The weather will be fine and it will become very hot over southern China. An area of low pressure may develop gradually to the east of the Philippines. However, its subsequent movement and intensity are uncertain with a higher chance of entering the central and northern parts of the South China Sea in the latter part of next week, moving in the general direction of the vicinity of the coast of western Guangdong.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260719","week":"Sunday","forecastWind":"Southwest force 4.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers and thunderstorms.
